questions.statement: Industrially, which acid is mainly produced by the carbonylation of methanol using carbon monoxide?

options: It marked a milestone toward transcriptional regulation. /
&nbsp;It eliminated the need for classical genetics. /
It initiated a new scientific domain.&nbsp; /
